overview.description: The Pacer Swan SOS Conservative (October) ETF (PSCQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on SPDR S&P 500 ETF over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. PSCQ was launched on Sep 30, 2021 and is issued by Pacer.
